decks.notes: This deck focuses on playing aggressively with creatures that have strong abilities and evasion, while also utilizing powerful spells like Lightning Bolt to control the board. The key strategy is to apply pressure early on with creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Territorial Kavu, while using spells like Leyline Binding to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury acts as a finisher, dealing massive damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Stubborn Denial and Consign to Memory for additional control, making it a versatile and formidable aggro deck in Modern format.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana through various land interactions and utilizing Primeval Titan to search for key lands and win conditions. The goal is to assemble the Amulet of Vigor combo and take advantage of the powerful land synergies to generate multiple strong plays in a single turn. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its efficient mana ramp and land-based abilities, leading to explosive plays and fast victories.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a mix of resilient creatures and burn spells. By curving out efficiently and utilizing cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Seasoned Pyromancer to generate value, the deck aims to apply pressure from multiple angles. The inclusion of Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury adds additional reach and finishing power. The deck is also equipped with disruption in the form of Ranger-Captain of Eos and Thraben Charm, while including versatile removal options like Goblin Bombardment. The deck's mana base allows for consistent access to its impactful threats and spells.

The main concept of this modern aggro deck is to quickly deploy powerful threats onto the battlefield, primarily focusing on aggressive creatures such as Hollow One, Detective's Phoenix, and Nethergoyf. The deck also utilizes cards like Faithless Looting and Burning Inquiry to dig for key pieces and fill up the graveyard for cards like Hollow One. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and aggressive game plan, utilizing burn spells like Lightning Bolt to finish off opponents or clear the way for its creatures to strike.

The deck focuses on fast and aggressive creatures and spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. It aims to control the board early on with low-cost creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ocelot Pride, while also utilizing powerful cards like Seasoned Pyromancer and Ranger-Captain of Eos for additional advantage. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls provide additional support and buffs to the creatures. Thraben Charm and Galvanic Discharge help deal with threats efficiently, while Arena of Glory provides a constant source of advantage. Blood Moon acts as a disruptive element to slow down the opponent's strategy.

This deck aims to win by deploying aggressive threats while disrupting the opponent's game plan. By using powerful creatures like Solitude, Ragavan, and Phelia, the deck puts pressure on the opponent while also controlling the board with cards like Consign to Memory and Galvanic Discharge. Quantum Riddler and Casey Jones provide additional utility and disruption, while Ephemerate helps to protect key threats. The deck also includes a small amount of removal in Prismatic Ending and wrath of the Skies, as well as some disruptive elements like Teferi, Time Raveler. The mana base is carefully constructed to support the deck's aggressive game plan.

This deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly to cast big Eldrazi creatures and powerful control spells. By using mana accelerants like Expedition Map and Talisman of Impulse, as well as the Eldrazi Temple lands, the deck can quickly ramp up to cast game-changing threats like Ulamog, the Ceaseless Hunger and Sire of Seven Deaths. Control elements like Thought-Knot Seer and Kozilek's Return help disrupt opponent's strategies while powerful planeswalkers like Karn, the Great Creator provide additional utility and threats. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful spells and creatures while disrupting their game plan.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and powerful creatures like Solitude and Phlage. Ragavan and Phelia provide early game pressure, while Quantum Riddler and Casey Jones offer card advantage and disruption. Consign to Memory provides flexibility, while Teferi, Time Raveler can shut down opposing strategies. The mana base is designed to support the deck's tri-color requirements, with fetch lands for consistency. Overall, the deck aims to control the game, disrupt the opponent's plans, and win through powerful threats.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying threats and disrupting opponents while generating value through artifact synergies. By utilizing cards such as Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble, the deck is able to ramp up quickly and overwhelm opponents with threats like Arcbound Ravager and Pinnacle Emissary. Engineered Explosives provides additional removal while Urza's Saga serves as a powerful utility land. Emry, Lurker of the Loch allows for recursion of artifacts, ensuring consistent value generation. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain tempo throughout the game.

The deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with disruptive elements to control the board and pressure the opponent. By utilizing powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd, along with removal spells like Solitude and Galvanic Discharge, the deck aims to create a fast-paced game plan that overwhelms the opponent while also disrupting their strategies. Quantum Riddler and Casey Jones, Vigilante provide additional utility and disruption, while cards like Consign to Memory and March of Otherworldly Light help with card advantage and tempo. The deck's mana base is efficient, enabling consistent access to its powerful threats and disruptors.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful board presence by cycling creatures with high mana costs into the graveyard and then casting Living End to bring them all back into play at once. It utilizes a variety of disruptive and controlling creatures to survive until the combo can be assembled, including cards like Subtlety and Endurance to disrupt opponents' strategies. The inclusion of cards like Force of Negation and Sink into Stupor provides additional protection and disruption, while Eldritch Evolution allows for tutoring specific creatures to adapt to different matchups.

This deck focuses on utilizing the Ruby Storm combo to quickly generate mana and cast a large number of spells in a single turn. By using cards like Ral, Monsson Mage, Desperate Ritual, Pyretic Ritual, and Manamorphose, the deck aims to chain together spells to generate a huge amount of mana and finish the game with powerful spells like Past in Flames or Wish. The deck also includes card draw and filtering like Reckless Impulse and Valakut Awakening to help find combo pieces and maintain momentum. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a flurry of spells in a single turn.
